T1.notes: Added VerifyBadge's third `skipped` status + RanVerifyBadge (Exclude<VerifyBadge,{status:"skipped"}>) so verifyProposal/verifyEdits' return type stays accurately green|red only.

T2.notes: runRefactor + runExtractDuplicate now skip verification (badge={status:"skipped",reason}) when checks fall back to DEFAULT_CHECKS and the finding/any location touches a .py file; explicit --checks override still runs as given. AC-1..AC-4 tests added and passing.

T3.notes: badgeLabel renders "⚠ verification skipped — <reason>" for the new status. AC-5 test added in refactor-cli.test.ts and passing.
